M0.interpretability_reason: Lookup table — every factor is directly readable

M1.interpretability_reason: Linear model — coefficients show per-feature contribution

M2.interpretability_reason: Linear model — coefficients show per-feature contribution

M3a.interpretability_reason: Two-stage decomposition — unit price + discount curve are inspectable

M3b.interpretability_reason: Two-stage decomposition — unit price + discount curve are inspectable

M4.interpretability_reason: Lasso with interactions — non-zero coefficients are readable, but many interaction terms

M5.interpretability_reason: Random Forest — feature importance available, but individual trees are opaque

M6.interpretability_reason: XGBoost — SHAP provides per-prediction explanations, but model internals are complex

M6b.interpretability_reason: XGBoost — SHAP provides per-prediction explanations, but model internals are complex

M7.interpretability_reason: XGBoost — SHAP provides per-prediction explanations, but model internals are complex

M7b.interpretability_reason: LightGBM — SHAP available, similar to XGBoost

M7c.interpretability_reason: LightGBM — SHAP available, similar to XGBoost

M8.interpretability_reason: 3 separate XGBoost models — harder to compare across estimators

M9.interpretability_reason: XGBoost — SHAP provides per-prediction explanations, but model internals are complex
